RULING:
HEARING ON APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION AND FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER: Settlement reached by the parties and stated for the record. Defendant accepts service of summons and complaint. Defendant waives right to have Plaintiff Caterpillar Financial Services Corporation personaly present to acknowledge the terms of settlement. Defendant understands and concurs with the terms of settlement. Orders signed. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
